response.text:
Verified: the front-panel Trigger equivalent is TRIGger, for example TRIGGER FORCE.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Verified front-panel Trigger SCPI command for MSO4/5/6 Series.","findings":["The Trigger command group record shows the set form as TRIGger with example usage TRIGGER FORCE.","This command forces a trigger event to occur and is the SCPI equivalent of the front-panel Trigger action."],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[]}

actionsJson.summary: Verified front-panel Trigger SCPI command for MSO4/5/6 Series.
findings: The Trigger command group record shows the set form as TRIGger with example usage TRIGGER FORCE.
This command forces a trigger event to occur and is the SCPI equivalent of the front-panel Trigger action.
